title: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs Beehiiv: pricing, features, ratings. Find the best email marketing platform for creators and newsletters.
h1: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv: Detailed Comparison for Email Marketers
intro: ConvertKit and Beehiiv are two of the most popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit is built for creators selling courses and digital products, while Beehiiv targets newsletter publishers focused on growth and monetization. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your goals.
choose_a_if: You sell digital products, courses, or online services and need built-in commerce features
You prioritize visual automation workflows for complex customer journeys
You want the most affordable entry point to paid plans ($29 vs $39)
choose_b_if: You run a newsletter and want monetization features like an ad network
You need advanced analytics and a web reader for your subscribers
You value higher customer satisfaction ratings and want the larger free tier

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. ConvertKit excels for creators selling digital products with its commerce features, while Beehiiv is superior for newsletter publishers seeking growth and monetization tools. Beehiiv has higher user satisfaction ratings overall, but ConvertKit remains the better choice for course creators.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Beehiiv?
faq.a: ConvertKit's paid plans start at $29/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a larger free tier (2,500 vs 1,000 subscribers), which may keep you in the free plan longer. The actual cost depends on your subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists, making migration possible. Most email marketing tools support CSV imports, so switching between ConvertKit and Beehiiv is straightforward. You'll want to test automations and landing pages on your new platform before fully migrating.
